subcodes.first_line: O Samad! Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One, and the glance of His loving-kindness is directed towards thee. Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صمد کتابت لدی المظلوم حاضر و طرف عنایت باو متوجه الحمد لله فائز شدی بانچه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
